raw_response:
```
{
  "rephrased_requirement": "Design an AI-powered document question-answering system that allows users to upload files, ask questions, and receive relevant answers with proper citation, while ensuring secure and fast processing, and providing accurate responses with a defined confidence threshold.",
  "functional_requirements": [
    "Support upload of PDF, DOCX, and TXT file formats",
    "Allow users to input questions in natural language",
    "Provide answers with relevant citations and references",
    "Enable users to view and manage their uploaded documents",
    "Implement a question-answer workflow with user feedback mechanism"
  ],
  "non_functional_requirements": [
    "Response latency: < 5 seconds",
    "Uptime expectation: 99.9% per month",
    "Retrieval accuracy: 90% for relevant documents",
    "Citation grounding quality: 95% for accurate references"
  ],
  "security_requirements": [
    "Implement document access controls with role-based authentication",
    "Encrypt documents at rest and in transit using AES-256",
    "Ensure tenant isolation for multi-tenant deployments",
    "Comply with GDPR and HIPAA regulations for data protection"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Successful upload and processing of 1000 documents within 1 hour",
    "Average response latency < 3 seconds for 90% of user queries",
    "User feedback mechanism captures and addresses 80% of user concerns",
    "System uptime exceeds 99.5% during the first 6 months of operation"
  ],
  "recommended_solution_approach": "Microservices-based architecture with containerized AI models, using a combination of natural language processing (NLP) and information retrieval (IR) techniques, and a cloud-based infrastructure for scalability and reliability",
  "open_questions": [
    "What is the expected volume of user uploads and queries per month?",
    "What are the specific regulatory requirements for data protection and compliance?",
    "How will the system handle ambiguous or unclear user questions?",
    "What is the budget for infrastructure and AI model development?"
  ]
}
```
